column1: #   Integrated Database of Hanzi Dictionaries in Early Japan
#   TSJ: Tenjibon Shinsen Jikyo database -- Headwords and definitions
#   Tenjibon Shinsen Jikyo 新撰字鏡, Tenji copy 天治本.
#   A complete manuscript of 1124 is held by the Imperial Household Archives.
#   Buddhist monk Shoju 昌住, c. 898-901.
#   Copyright (c) 2018-2026 HDIC project, IKEDA Shoju (Chair, Professor Emeritus, Hokkaido University)
#   LI Yuan (Person in charge of text data proofreading)
#   LIU Guanwei (Person in charge of image database design and implementation)
#   Data License Information and Access Rights
#   Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-SA 4.0)
#   [SJID (svvwwxyyz): Book(vv), leaf(ww), recto-verso(x), line(yy) and number(z). Refer to TSJ_entries.tsv]
#   SJ2ID: For headword of two or more characters, add 'a, b, ..., n' at the end of SJID
#   SJ_def: Definition of pronunciation, meaning and variant(s)
#   ZhangLei_page: Xin zhuan zi jing xiao zhu 新撰字鏡校注
#   山田攷異: 山田孝雄『新撰字鏡攷異并索引』六合館，1916
#   国語索引：京都大学文学部国語学国文学研究室編『新撰字鏡国語索引』1958、再版臨川書店，1975
#   張磊校注: 張磊・吴美富『新撰字鏡校注』浙江大学出版社，2024
#   We are grateful to the Imperial Household Archives 宮内廳書陵部 for permission to publish the decipherment text of TSJ.
#   This work was supported by JSPS KAKENHI Grant Number 25370506, 16H03422, 19H00526, 23K17500, 25K00466 and 26K21717.

column3: 躰年他前二反。平聲：顛也，尊也，頂也，君清輕在上也。
二同。下老反。上聲：昊天夏天也。
字林反。釜属也。倭云加奈戸。𩱭字。
土天土言二反。平：食也，咽也，滅也。又曲音，頓音。
古惠反。去。或作炅。光明也，人姓也。和云比加利弖留。

column4: 注文：享和本作“先盍反。入：醜。倭云加太奈志”。新撰字鏡攷異5頁。
